docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT PALANG, BERNADETTE HEARING SET FOR DEC-29-2005 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PALANG, BERNADETTE
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2005, OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEFENDANT PALANG, BERNADETTE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAGBANUA, VALLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PALANG, BERNADETTE $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,422.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT FOLLOW THROUGH WITH THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY MAGBANUA, VALLY AS TO DEFENDANT PALANG, BERNADETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-18-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE SETTLED BETWEEN THE PARTIES. DEFT WILL PAY PLTF A TOTAL OF $1400 - PAYABLE $200/MONTH COMMENCING 3/15/05. CONT'D FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENTS. IF NO APPEARANCE, CONTINUE FOR 4 MONTHS.
